_note: SAMPLE ingested items for the admin Inbox demo. The pipeline (ingest/pipeline.js) writes files like this after fetching enabled, permitted sources. Nothing here is published until a human reviews it. Replace with real output by running `npm run ingest` once you have configured permitted sources in ingest/sources.config.json.

items.title: Example: a national federation publishes updated tournament sanctioning notes
items.summary: Example digest item for the editor inbox. In production, replace this with a short, factual note written from the source and link back to the original.
items.license: link-only; summarise in our own words; do not republish

items.title: Example: a paddle maker announces a new control-oriented model
items.summary: Example editor note: verify specs against the maker's official page before drafting or publishing.
items.license: facts/specs only; no marketing copy reproduced

items.title: Example: a reviewer publishes impressions of a midweight paddle
items.summary: Example editor note: cite that a review exists, summarize the takeaway in original wording, and add independent reasoning.
